hypothesis: Fine-tuning the pre-trained eSEN model with an active-learning set of ≤20 DFT-evaluated images sampled from the ML-converged SSNEB pathway will reduce the number of DFT SSNEB iterations required during the VASP restart by at least 30% relative to using the un-finetuned eSEN, lower the stress mean absolute error against VASP below 0.05 GPa, and produce a final MEP barrier height within 0.02 eV of the VASP-only result.
